name: normal
morph_traits: plain fur or smooth skin, no special features, neutral earth tones, simple round shapes

name: fire
morph_traits: flame-tipped tail and ears, ember scales or magma-cracked skin, orange and red color palette, glowing eyes

name: water
morph_traits: fins replacing ears and tail tip, smooth wet scales, blue and teal color palette, gill slits on neck

name: electric
morph_traits: jagged lightning-bolt shaped tail and spines, yellow and white color palette, sparking fur tips, sharp angular features

name: grass
morph_traits: leaf-shaped ears and tail, vine or petal growths on body, green color palette, floral patterns on skin

name: ice
morph_traits: crystalline ice spikes on back and tail, pale blue and white color palette, frosted fur, sharp angular icy features

name: fighting
morph_traits: bulky muscular build, thick limbs, scarred or calloused skin, earthy red and brown tones, determined expression

name: poison
morph_traits: venomous fangs or stingers, purple and acid-green color palette, toxic slime coating, barbed tail

name: ground
morph_traits: rocky plated hide, sandy brown color palette, clawed flat feet, earthen crystal growths, heavy stocky frame

name: flying
morph_traits: feathered wings replacing front limbs or on back, hollow light bones, sky blue and white color palette, streamlined body

name: psychic
morph_traits: glowing third eye on forehead, pink and lavender color palette, ethereal aura, enlarged smooth cranium

name: bug
morph_traits: chitinous exoskeleton plating, compound eyes, antenna on head, green and brown color palette, segmented limbs

name: rock
morph_traits: stone-encrusted shell or plating, grey and brown color palette, angular blocky features, crystal mineral growths

name: ghost
morph_traits: translucent wispy body edges, hollow black eye sockets, purple and black color palette, shadowy vapour trailing from tail

name: dragon
morph_traits: small wing membranes on back, horn or crest on head, scaled body, deep blue and purple color palette, slit pupils

name: dark
morph_traits: shadowy dark fur, black and dark grey color palette, jagged spiky edges, menacing narrow eyes, tattered ear tips

name: steel
morph_traits: metallic plated armour on torso and limbs, silver and gunmetal color palette, mechanical joint lines, reflective smooth surfaces

name: fairy
morph_traits: small ornate wings, pastel pink and white color palette, glowing sparkles around body, round soft features, flower or star motifs
